title: Implied or constructive termination of contract
content:
Where in accordance with any enactment or rule of law—
	
(a)	
any act on the part of the employer; or
	
(b)	
any event affecting an employer (including, in the case 
of an individual, his death),
operates so as to terminate a contract under which an employee is 
employed by him, that act or event shall for the purposes of this 
Part be treated as a termination of the contract by the employer, if 
apart from this section it would not constitute a termination of the 
contract by him.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
